title: William M. (Mac) Thornberry National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021
fullText:
William M. (Mac) Thornberry National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 (Public Law 116-283).
An Act to authorize appropriations for fiscal year 2021 for military activities of the Department of Defense, and for other purposes.

Amended multiple sections (3101, 3102, 3103, 3113) of Title 38 to replace 'or air service' with 'air, or space service', formally establishing the Space Force as an eligible branch of military service for Chapter 31 vocational rehabilitation.
plainEnglish: Explicitly added the United States Space Force to all references of military service branches in the laws governing veteran benefits.
veteranUse: Ensures Space Force veterans are explicitly eligible for all Chapter 31 benefits under the same rules as other service branches.

amendmentNotes.note: Enacted provisions affecting 38 USC 3101, 38 USC 3103, 38 USC 3113.
